auth.bodyMetricsDesc: Enter your height and weight for personalized recommendations.

auth.profileExtrasDesc: Your workout goal and home gym help personalize recommendations.

Seat, pin, ROM, and weight settings

settings.voiceCoachDesc: Spoken countdown and reps between sets. You can also adjust this on the workout log screen.
settings.restDurationDesc: Countdown length after you complete a set. Minutes step by 1, seconds by 5. Default is 1 minute 30 seconds.
settings.weightDifficultyDesc: Make recommended weights lighter or heavier. Default uses the algorithm as-is.
settings.weightDifficultyHintDefault: Uses the algorithmic recommended weight as-is.
settings.resetDesc: Restore app preferences (units, rest time, voice count, weight difficulty) to defaults. Body profile values are kept.
settings.resetConfirmMessage: Units, rest time, voice count, and weight difficulty will return to defaults. Your body profile will not change.

home.title: MachineFit

home.heroDesc: We analyze your height, weight, and profile to recommend optimal seat, pin, and lever positions.

home.favoritesEmptyHint: Tap ♥ on a machine detail page to save it here

daily.subtitle: Compare daily total volume across all machines

machineChart.desc: How many machines you logged each day.

insights.title: Personalized growth insights
insights.profileRequired: Add height, weight, and gender in Settings to compare with similar users.

profileAverage.title: Profile-based average comparison
profileAverage.desc: {{period}} · Compare daily metrics with similar users

maxWeight.title: Daily max weight
maxWeight.hint: Heaviest set across all machines on a workout day

sessionVolume.title: Daily total volume
sessionVolume.hint: Average sum of all machine volumes on workout days

growth.title: Daily total volume growth
growth.hint: Change from first to last workout day in {{period}}

peerComparison.title: Peer total volume growth (same height, class, gender)
peerComparison.definition: Percent change in daily total volume (all machines) from your first workout day to your last in {{period}}.
peerComparison.definitionExample: Example: 800 kg first day → 960 kg last day = +20% growth
peerComparison.myGrowthHint: First workout day vs last workout day
peerComparison.peerAvgHint: Average daily volume growth for similar users
peerComparison.interpretAbove: You are growing faster than similar users.
peerComparison.interpretNear: You are growing at a similar pace to peers.
peerComparison.interpretBelow: Growth is slower than peers. Try increasing daily total volume step by step.
peerComparison.interpretUnknown: Log at least 2 workout days to compare growth.

consistency.above: More workout days can help you outgrow similar users.
consistency.near: Workout days are low. Aim for 2–3 logged days per week.
consistency.below: Long gaps slow progress. Restart with a shorter cycle.

intensity.above: Volume is steady but plateauing. Try the next total volume target.
intensity.near: Daily total volume is flat. Add a little weight or sets.
intensity.below: Time to raise intensity. Increase daily total volume gradually.

volume.above: Strong growth. Balance workout days and total volume.
volume.near: Average growth. Try raising daily total volume a bit more.
volume.below: Slower than peers. Increase total volume step by step.

recovery.above: Recent daily volume dropped. Recover, then build back up.
recovery.near: Volume decreased. Resume within a comfortable range.
recovery.below: Signs of overload. Consider a lighter recovery week.

maintain.above: Ahead of similar users. Keep your current pace.
maintain.near: Doing well vs average. Avoid big jumps.
maintain.below: Good progress. Focus on the next total volume target.

tips.consistency: Logging on similar weekdays makes daily trends easier to read.
tips.intensity: Track both daily max weight and total volume for balanced progress.
tips.volume: A ~10% daily volume increase is a safe progression.
tips.recovery: Prioritize sleep and protein; focus on volume recovery this week.
tips.maintain: Raise your daily volume target in ~50 kg steps every 2–3 weeks.
tips.plateau: If total volume stalls 2+ weeks, add a machine or an extra set.
tips.lowFrequency: Few workout days in this period. Aim for at least 2 per week.
tips.abovePeer: Growth is above similar users. Watch for overtraining.
tips.belowPeer: To match peers, try increasing daily total volume by 10–15%.

nextVolumeTarget.title: Next workout total volume target
nextVolumeTarget.desc: Based on your latest daily total volume and progressive overload

growthAnalysis.empty: No workout logs yet. Log sets on a recommendation result page to get started.
growthAnalysis.noDataInPeriod: No records in the selected period.

periodRange.calendarHint: Tap a start date, then an end date to set FROM~TO. Dotted days have workout logs.

volumeChart.title: Volume over time
volumeChart.desc: Daily total volume with trend line.

insights.title: Personalized growth insights
insights.profileRequired: Add height, weight, and gender in settings to compare with similar users.
insights.noBenchmark: Comparison data is not ready yet.

profileAverage.title: Body profile average comparison
profileAverage.desc: {{period}} · three metrics vs your similar-user cohort

maxWeight.title: Max weight (PR)
maxWeight.hint: Heaviest weight lifted on this machine

sessionVolume.title: Volume per session
sessionVolume.hint: Average total weight per workout (all sets)

growth.title: Volume growth rate
growth.hint: First vs last log change in {{period}}

peerComparison.title: Cohort volume growth (height · class · gender)
peerComparison.definition: In {{period}}, how much your total volume (sum of all set weights) on this machine changed from your first log to your last log, shown as a percentage.
peerComparison.myGrowthHint: First vs last log in the period
peerComparison.peerAvgHint: Average growth for similar height, boxing class & gender
peerComparison.interpretAbove: You are growing faster than similar users.
peerComparison.interpretNear: You are growing at a similar pace to the cohort average.
peerComparison.interpretBelow: Growth is slower than the cohort average. Try increasing sets or load gradually.
peerComparison.interpretUnknown: Log at least two workouts to compare growth rates.

consistency.above: Increasing workout frequency can accelerate growth further.
consistency.near: Workout frequency is low. Aim for 2–3 logged sessions per week.
consistency.below: Long gaps between sessions are slowing progress. Restart with a shorter cycle.

intensity.above: Volume is steady but max weight has plateaued. Try the next target load.
intensity.near: Weight has stalled. Increase load slightly on each set.
intensity.below: It is time to raise intensity with small load increases.

volume.above: Growth is strong. Balance load and set count carefully.
volume.near: You are growing at an average pace. Try raising total volume a bit.
volume.below: Growth is below cohort average. Increase sets or load gradually.

recovery.above: Recent volume dropped. Resume after recovery.
recovery.near: Volume decreased recently. Restart within a comfortable range.
recovery.below: Signs of fatigue. Use a lighter recovery week.

maintain.above: You are outpacing similar users. Keep the current pace.
maintain.near: You are ahead of average. Prefer small jumps over big leaps.
maintain.below: Growth is healthy. Focus on the next target weight.

tips.consistency: Logging on the same weekdays makes trends easier to read.
tips.intensity: Train around RPE 7–8 instead of failure every set for sustainable gains.
tips.volume: Adding 2.5 kg per set while keeping set count is a safe progression.
tips.recovery: Prioritize sleep and protein; focus on form over PRs this week.
tips.maintain: Try a 2.5–5 kg increase every 2–3 weeks for progressive overload.
tips.plateau: If weight stalls for 2+ weeks, add one set or shorten rest periods.
tips.lowFrequency: Recent logs are sparse. Target at least twice per week.
tips.abovePeer: You are growing faster than similar users. Watch for overtraining.
tips.belowPeer: To match the cohort average, try raising total volume by 10–15%.

nextTarget.title: Next workout target weight
nextTarget.desc: Suggested from recent logs and progressive overload

briefing.title: Today's workout briefing
briefing.summary: Today: {{recommendations}} recommendations · {{logs}} saved logs · {{machines}} machines · {{volume}} kg total volume · max {{maxWeight}} kg
briefing.empty: No workouts logged yet today. Search a machine and get your settings!

workoutReport.title: Workout report email
workoutReport.desc: Receive a summary of your workout logs for the selected period.
workoutReport.failed: We couldn't send the report. Please try again in a moment.
workoutReport.emailRequired: An email address is required on your account to send reports.
workoutReport.copied: Report copied. Paste it wherever you like.

pwa.installHint: Add to your home screen for faster access at the gym.
pwa.installSuccess: Added to your home screen — open it even faster next time.
pwa.iosInstallHint: In Safari, tap Share (↑), then “Add to Home Screen”.
pwa.chromeInstallHint: Use the install icon in the address bar, or Menu (⋮) → “Install MachineFit”.
pwa.chromeMobileInstallHint: In Chrome, open Menu (⋮) → “Install app” or “Add to Home screen”.
